'''madhasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeehorse|zeehorse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeehorse|zeehorse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| madhasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædhæsæth|mædhæsæth]] || [[word:mædhæsæj|mædhæsæj]] || [[word:mædhæsæsh|mædhæsæsh]] || [[word:mædhæsæ|mædhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhadhasath|madhadhasath]] || [[word:madhadhasaj|madhadhasaj]] || [[word:madhadhasash|madhadhasash]] || [[word:madhadhasa|madhadhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhasath|madhasath]] || [[word:madhasaj|madhasaj]] || [[word:madhasash|madhasash]] || [[word:madhasa|madhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhafsath|madhafsath]] || [[word:madhafsaj|madhafsaj]] || [[word:madhafsash|madhafsash]] || [[word:madhafsaf|madhafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhasatha|madhasatha]] || [[word:madhasaja|madhasaja]] || [[word:madhasasha|madhasasha]] || [[word:madhasaka|madhasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhasath|madhasath]] || [[word:madhasaj|madhasaj]] || [[word:madhasash|madhasash]] || [[word:madhasa|madhasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhasathal|madhasathal]] || [[word:madhasajal|madhasajal]] || [[word:madhasashal|madhasashal]] || [[word:madhasakal|madhasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhasathatha|madhasathatha]] || [[word:madhasajaja|madhasajaja]] || [[word:madhasashasha|madhasashasha]] || [[word:madhasaka|madhasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhasathan|madhasathan]] || [[word:madhasajan|madhasajan]] || [[word:madhasashan|madhasashan]] || [[word:madhasakan|madhasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhasathaoro|madhasathaoro]] || [[word:madhasajaoro|madhasajaoro]] || [[word:madhasashaoro|madhasashaoro]] || [[word:madhasakaoro|madhasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
